name: inferoa
description: Inference-native Tokenmaxxing agent harness for long-horizon tasks in the vLLM ecosystem.

scripts.validate:t0: npm run build && node dist/src/validation/milestone.js T0
scripts.validate:t1: npm run build && node dist/src/validation/milestone.js T1
scripts.validate:t2: npm run build && node dist/src/validation/milestone.js T2
scripts.validate:t3: npm run build && node dist/src/validation/milestone.js T3
scripts.validate:t4: npm run build && node dist/src/validation/milestone.js T4
scripts.validate:t5: npm run build && node dist/src/validation/milestone.js T5
scripts.validate:t6: npm run build && node dist/src/validation/milestone.js T6
scripts.validate:t7: npm run build && node dist/src/validation/milestone.js T7
scripts.validate:t8: npm run build && node dist/src/validation/milestone.js T8
scripts.validate:t9: npm run build && node dist/src/validation/milestone.js T9
scripts.validate:t10: npm run build && node dist/src/validation/milestone.js T10
scripts.validate:all: npm run build && for milestone in T0 T1 T2 T3 T4 T5 T6 T7 T8 T9 T10; do node dist/src/validation/milestone.js $milestone || exit 1; done
